articles.title: Oil prices rise, but not by enough to keep Wall Street from more records
articles.description: Expensive oil has already sent inflation higher, which increases not only bills for households but also yields in the bond market. High yields worldwide recently have threatened to slow economies and undercut prices for stocks and all kinds of other investments.

articles.title: Dow, Nasdaq fall as oil prices jump on Iran concerns
articles.description: US stocks open mixed as oil jumps on West Asia tensions, Dow falls 0.2% while S&P 500 and Nasdaq are flat, crude surges after Iran suspends talks with the United States.

articles.title: After Hormuz, Iran moves to block Bab El-Mandeb Strait after halting US talks; oil surges 8%
articles.description: The move has rattled global markets, with oil prices surging more than 8 per cent to around $94 per barrel amid fears of a wider regional escalation.

articles.title: Mark Zandi: Trump Has Days to Strike Iran Deal Before US Economic Problems
articles.description: Oil prices could soar again absent a peace deal with Iran, Zandi said. Crude saw a fresh spike on Monday as US-Iran talks appeared to stall.

articles.title: Economist Mark Zandi says Trump has a week to strike Iran deal before US faces a 'real problem'
articles.description: Oil prices could soar again absent a peace deal with Iran, Zandi said. Crude saw a fresh spike on Monday as US-Iran talks appeared to stall.

articles.title: Michigan gas prices drop noticeably for second week in a row, AAA says
articles.description: Motorists are now paying an average of $4.35 per gallon for regular unleaded, compared to $4.63 on May 25 and $4.84 on May 18.

articles.title: How AWL Agri is trying to decouple itself from swings in crude oil prices as the West Asia crisis pushes up costs
articles.description: The company is trying to decouple itself from swings in crude oil prices as the west asia crisis pushes up costs.

articles.title: Maruti goes slow on EV capacity expansion as cost-effective CNG booms amid war-triggered inflation
articles.description: Maruti Suzuki announces a focus on CNG vehicles following high demand, delaying its EV production ramp-up to September. With CNG prices rising slower than petrol, its market share has increased, while competitors are experiencing a surge in EV sales.
